architecture.summary: The paper proposes a hybrid architecture that integrates deep learning pattern recognition with symbolic rule-based reasoning in TinyLlama. The system combines the intuitive pattern recognition capabilities of deep learning with structured, rule-based logic to improve information retrieval, contextual query processing, and factual accuracy. Information flows from input queries through both deep learning pathways (pattern matching) and symbolic reasoning pathways (rule-based logic), with outputs integrated to produce enhanced responses.

biblio.title: Integrating Deep Learning with Symbolic Reasoning in TinyLlama for Accurate Information Retrieval

claims.statement: The improved TinyLlama model demonstrates a significant elevation in performance by integrating deep learning with symbolic reasoning
The hybrid model achieves improvements in accuracy, logical consistency, and rule adherence
The hybrid architecture addresses inherent limitations of LLMs in processing contextually complex queries and ensuring factual accuracy
The hybrid model is positioned as a more transparent and reliable AI tool due to emphasis on model interpretability and trust
